title: Paragon Workflow Execution
description: A Workflow Execution represents a single historical run of an integration workflow, including its status, duration, and task count.

id.description: The unique identifier for the workflow execution.

userId.description: The Connected User ID associated with this execution.

workflowId.description: The workflow ID that was executed.

status.description: The status of the workflow execution.

taskCount.description: The number of tasks executed in this workflow run.

runDuration.description: The duration of the workflow execution in milliseconds.

dateStarted.description: The date and time the workflow execution started (ISO 8601).

dateEnded.description: The date and time the workflow execution ended (ISO 8601).
